item.title: Ugh. Full time back in office sucks...
item.description: Back in office full time. Don't know why tiny octopus feels so drained. Like just, bleah...It'll get better, but this first week absolutely sucked. This is one of those times tiny octopus wants a hetero life mate, just so they can be like, "lay here" and be the big spoon for a minute. And yeah, it don't amount to a hill of beans in this crazy world, but someone come get tiny octopus' credit card and go get him sushi. all salmon nigiri please.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: "Why doesn't anyone step in?" American History
item.description: It was later understood that the number wasn't 38. Further, none saw the attack in its entirety. Only a few had glimpsed parts of it, or recognized the cries for help. Many thought they had heard lovers or drunks quarreling. There were two attacks, not three. And afterward, two people did call the police. A 70-year-old woman ventured out and cradled the dying victim in her arms until they arrived. Ms. Genovese died on the way to a hospital. The incident prompted inquiries into what became known as the bystander effect, or "Genovese syndrome", EDIT: LOOK HERE THERE ARE WORDS HERE DON'T JUST LOOK AT PICTURES.
item.dc:creator: AranaDiscoteca

item.title: a peek into what art college was like for me!
item.description: I really enjoyed it ☺️ I initially was a psychology major, and quickly switched over to art major when I discovered how much I enjoyed the drawing classes. One of my professors thought I should try the painting class, and I've been painting ever since! :) rebeccasalinasart.com
item.dc:creator: friendlynoodles

item.title: Dude
item.description: Some things include, but are not limited to: Nazis Getting jumped Surrendering my cats Hit by a car Heart disease Getting dosed Watching friends destroy themselves while personally struggling with addiction Being threatened by my prior boss And and and and and But i still haven't relapsed. When I said I was done, I meant it.
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: Blank Check for Musk
item.description: Bill giving Congressional Authority to Musk to eliminate any executive department, agency, independent establishment, corporation, office, or officer, found unnecessary. Comer sponsors this bill yet is unaware of the language within that allows Musk to bypass Congress
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1313 (pizza funeral)
item.description:
I ended up having to get a new phone. It was either that or wait a week for a new screen. I lost about two weeks of scoured memes, and my updated Favorite Memes folder... Luckily I back up my main meme stash which goes back about a month on my SD CARD, so uh, we're so back. Look to my coming, at around dawn Arizona Standard Time every day, I guess.
An expanded version of Coffin Texts 714, as mentioned in yesterday's post.
How the Dutch rolled.
Pippin does this and then steals keys.
The B O N E S
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [contented grunts as he preens my eyelashes and drinks my tears] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
